title: Forget Tech: These 3 Funds Yield 11% and They’re Just Getting Started
author: Brett Owens
description: As tech stocks dominate market gains, contrarian investors can capitalize on discounted closed-end funds offering yields up to 11.8%. Three funds—Gabelli Equity Trust (GAB), DoubleLine Income Solutions Fund (DSL), and NXG Nextgen Infrastructure Income Fund (NXG)—provide diversified exposure to stocks, bonds, and infrastructure while trading at significant discounts to net asset value.

title: $9.8 Billion in Autonomy Spending Hits the AI-Boosted Defense Supply Chain
author: Equity Insider
description: Congress approved an $839 billion defense spending bill for fiscal 2026, allocating $9.8 billion toward autonomous and unmanned systems development. The global AI in defense and aerospace market is projected to grow from $4.2 billion in 2026 to $42.8 billion by 2036 at a 26.4% CAGR. Major defense contractors including Howmet Aerospace, Curtiss-Wright, Parsons, and HII secured significant contracts and partnerships to support military modernization and AI integration initiatives.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Reported record Q4 2025 results with 15% YoY revenue growth, 20% defense aerospace growth, and 40% EPS growth. FY 2026 guidance projects 10% revenue growth to $9.0-9.2 billion with strong free cash flow generation.
Selected by Boeing for C-17 Globemaster III modernization program with estimated lifetime contract value exceeding $400 million, reinforcing its role in aerospace modernization.
Awarded $125 million five-year task order contract with U.S. Army for high-performance computing and AI/ML research, continuing a 20+ year partnership with DEVCOM ARL.
Partnering with Path Robotics to integrate physical AI into naval shipbuilding, addressing labor shortages and advancing manufacturing capabilities for defense production.

title: Marine Sensors Market to Reach $1.9 Billion by 2028, Growing at 6.5% CAGR: Exploring the Depths of Growth
author: Marketsandmarkets
description: The marine sensors market is projected to grow from $1.4 billion in 2023 to $1.9 billion by 2028, driven by increasing demand for underwater vehicles and maritime transportation technologies, with Asia Pacific expected to lead market growth.

title: Aircraft Switches Market is Forecasted to Reach US$1.61 Billion in 2034, Says Stratview Research
author: Stratview Research
description: The global aircraft switches market is expected to grow from $1.11 billion in 2024 to $1.61 billion by 2034, with a 3.5% CAGR. Commercial aircraft and linefit installations will drive market expansion, with North America currently dominating the market.

title: Flight Data Monitoring Market Outlook 2025-2034 | Stricter Regulations Propel Growth Toward USD 15.5 Billion
author: Researchandmarkets.Com
description: The Flight Data Monitoring (FDM) market is projected to grow from $7.7 billion in 2025 to $15.5 billion by 2034, driven by advancements in AI, cloud solutions, and a focus on safety and efficiency due to rising air traffic. Key players are investing in predictive maintenance and mobile FDM solutions, and the market is further propelled by growing demand for data security and sustainability.
